title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server for running LLMs locally with a simple API and model library.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models programmatically.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same feature parity as Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration enabling Ollama models as LLM, chat, or embedding backends.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama—chat folders, model manager, code highlighting, RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; offers synchronous & asynchronous APIs and model management.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for chatting and managing Ollama models.

title: ollama-cli (npm)
summary: Lightweight CLI wrapper around ollama-js for quick prompts and model pulls.

title: OllamaSharp
summary: .NET/C# client with async streaming, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Deepset Haystack 2.x integration providing Ollama generators and embedders for pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for deploying, benchmarking, and extending Ollama (Kubernetes, GPU, etc.).

title: ollama-guardrails
summary: Proof-of-concept guardrail service that filters Ollama inputs/outputs for safety.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + llama.cpp for vector search.
